_readme: Copy this file to config.json and edit every value. Do NOT commit config.json — it contains your personal brand data.

brand.name: YOUR BRAND NAME
brand._note_name: Shown in the footer of every card (e.g. 'AUSSIE UMMA'). Keep it short — 2-3 words max.
brand._note_account: Shown in the top-right of every card except the cover. Include the @ symbol.

content.niche: What your account covers in one sentence. Be specific — not 'tips' but 'brain-science-backed health habits for busy Korean professionals'.
content.target_audience: Who reads your content. Include their age range, language, what they want, and what frustrates them. The copywriter writes in this audience's language.
content.tone: How your brand sounds in one sentence. Give a specific voice example, not an abstract label. E.g. 'A knowledgeable friend who explains complex things over coffee, never condescending, always ends with what to do next.'
topics_to_avoid: Saturated topic you never want covered
Another topic your audience doesn't care about
content._note_avoid: List topics that are either off-brand or too saturated in your niche. The trend-researcher will never suggest these. Leave empty [] if you have no restrictions.
content._note_themes: Broad topic areas the trend-researcher prioritizes. These are not individual topics — they're clusters it tries to match trending content against. 3-6 items is ideal.
search_contexts: Specific community or source (e.g. 'Blind app burnout posts')
Content signal (e.g. 'YouTube shorts with 500K+ views in wellness')
content._note_search: Where the trend-researcher looks for trending signals. Be specific about platforms, hashtags, communities, and what indicates 'trending' (view count, save count, comment volume). 3-5 contexts.
content._note_cta: Text shown on the save button on Card 10. Most Korean accounts use '저장하기 →'. Change only if your brand uses different CTA language.

design._note_theme: Currently only 'dark-modern' is supported. The design system in tokens.css is built for dark backgrounds.
design._note_primary: Main accent color (hex). Used for highlights, badges, buttons, dots, glows. Default neon lime. Alternatives: #FFB347 (warm), #5EEAD4 (calm), #FF6B6B (energy), #94A3B8 (professional).
design._note_secondary: Secondary accent (hex). Used for the second approach block border on Card 06. Default blue. Change only if you have a specific two-color scheme.

pipeline._note_count: How many carousels to produce per run. Default 2. Each carousel = 1 topic × 10 cards. More carousels = longer runtime and more API tokens.
pipeline._note_cards: Cards per carousel. The system is designed and tested for exactly 10. Other counts are untested — the 10-card narrative arc and component assignments will break.
